arts.ttl: West Ham vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: West Ham host Newcastle in the Premier League on Monday night. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between West Ham United and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: “Everyone aligns” | Kudus gives praise to Potter
arts.sum: Mohammed Kudus is the latest player to praise the impact of Graham Potter at West Ham. The Ghana international has acknowledged it hasn’t been the best of the seasons for the club and on a personal level, however he admits that things are turning as we look to end the season well. “We’re going in... The post “Everyone aligns” | Kudus gives praise to Potter appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak one goal away from Newcastle record Alan Shearer never managed
arts.sum: West Ham will decide a lot for Wembley _ if Martin Dubravka starts in goal as a reward for his loyalty, if Kieran Trippier gets an unexpected starting place, if Tino Livramento is the accepted left-back replacement, if Harvey Barnes is to at last step out of the shadows and prove himself to be a £37m buy or if Joe Willock is to be catapulted back into the public consciousness. Now we go again attempting to wipe out the memory of a similar SJP setback at the feet of West Ham before travelling back to the capital for the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United will love 'unreal' transfer target's reaction to Harry Kane
arts.sum: Newcastle are expected to renew their interest in Trafford in the summer, which won't come as a surprise to Lescott, who was struck by the goalkeeper's ability to 'turn it on'. Joleon Lescott has admitted that he is'surprised' James Trafford is still at Burnley because the Newcastle United target is 'unreal'.

arts.ttl: Newcastle face losing key star for a month if this happens
arts.sum: Newcastle United star Joelinton could be set for a two-match ban if he picks up a booking against West Ham United in the upcoming Premier League match. The Brazilian has already served a one-match suspension for picking up five yellow cards within the first 19 matches of the season. Since returning from his suspension, he […] The post Newcastle face losing key star for a month if this happens appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Premier League rivals looking to raid West Ham for 32-year-old ace
arts.sum: Southampton are interested in signing the West Ham United Striker Danny Ings at the end of the season. The 32-year-old has never quite managed to live up to the expectations since the move to the London club and West Ham could be open to getting rid of him in the summer. arts.ttl: Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United and West Ham United to play in Premier League Summer Series
arts.sum: Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United and West Ham United will play preseason matches in the United States as part of the second Premier League Summer Series. On July 30 at Soldier Field in Chicago, West Ham United will play Everton and Manchester United faces Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Ex-Fulham and Newcastle star Aleksandar Mitrovic taken to hospital with heart issue
arts.sum: Reports in Saudi Arabia claim that Al Hilal striker and former Premier League marksman Aleksandar Mitrovic was taken to hospital on Sunday with a rapid heartbeat
